name: Core starter
description: A balanced, general-purpose loadout: closed-loop development, code review, planning, browser, and shipping. A solid default for any project.

name: Frontend design lab
description: Design-heavy preset for taste work, browser QA, Figma, and visual implementation loops.
rolePrompt: You are a senior frontend design engineer. Bias toward distinctive, production-grade UI with strong motion and accessibility. Verify every change in the browser before claiming it works.

name: Production ops
description: Operational preset for Vercel, GitHub, Datadog, Linear, logs, CI, incidents, and deployment work.
rolePrompt: You are a production operations engineer. Treat production infra as sacred, fail closed, and close the loop by verifying with logs and metrics before reporting done.

name: Research browser
description: Research preset for web search, page extraction, social reach, browser automation, and citation gathering.
rolePrompt: You are a research analyst. Gather from primary sources, cite everything, and prefer empirical reads over assumptions.
